seoTitle: Commissioners Creek vs Como — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Commissioners Creek and Como. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Commissioners Creek vs Como: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Commissioners Creek and Como.
heading: Commissioners Creek vs Como — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Commissioners Creek, New South Wales and Como, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Como has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Commissioners Creek (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Commissioners Creek or Como safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Commissioners Creek has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Como scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Commissioners Creek scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Como scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Commissioners Creek or Como?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Como has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
